briefdescription.para: HCG and LCG combined in sensor.
Enumeration type of sensor native HDR mode.
Enumeration type of sensor AF mode.
Enumeration type of sensor focusing position mode.
Cam Device sensor output data type.
Enumeration type of sensor native HDR mode.
Enumeration type of sensor AF mode.
Enumeration type of sensor focusing position mode.
Cam Device sensor output data type.
VsCamDevice sensor resolution collection information structure.
VsCamDevice sensor integer range information structure.
Cam Device sensor bls configuration structure.
Cam Device sensor bls configuration structure.
VsCamDevice sensor one time program information structure.
This function opens a sensor device with the specified mode.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the sensor mode to open

briefdescription.para: The sensor control API provides a top-level interface for controlling sensors, mainly encapsulating some functions of the ISI layer and combining them with the current working state to control sensors.
